programs.title: Cashing In on the Elderly: Who to Trust? Tonight
programs.desc: Ruth Dodsworth reports on elderly people falling victim to economic abuse from both professional and family carers, and how they can protect themselves.

programs.title: Emmerdale
programs.desc: Sarah urges Jacob to stand up to his bully. Joe makes a promise. Mandy's heartbroken over the closure of the salon.

programs.title: Coronation Street
programs.desc: Hope pushes Daniel's buttons at school, Todd confides his anger to George, and a seemingly innocent photograph reveals a hidden presence at the scene of the crime.

programs.title: Long Lost Family
programs.desc: A mum who recently had cancer looks for the baby she gave up as a teenager, and a woman who was donor-conceived seeks answers to her many questions.
